backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that wires together authorization, user approval, and blob storage mixins, and exposes endpoints for profile management, Friends Mode requests, ban appeals, moderator applications, and admin moderation actions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two implemented features in SettingsPage.tsx: an 'Apply to be a Moderator' section with a 1000-character textarea and counter, and the submission logic that opens a moderator review URL in a new tab with appended application details.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Scrambly app that sets the page title, configures a Sonic Mania-themed favicon and apple-touch-icon, and mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that defines the TanStack Router route tree, wrapping most pages in an auth-gated layout while keeping the appeal route publicly accessible, and includes a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccountLockedMes: Displays a full-screen locked-account message explaining why the account was locked and providing a logout button for the user to create a new account.
UI toggle component that reads and updates the ad-blocker state via the useAdBlocker hook, displaying a shield icon and a labeled switch with an active badge.
frontend/src/components/AgeVerificationM: Modal form that collects a user's name and birth year, submits them for age verification, and displays access-denied or error states based on the result.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Top-level authentication wrapper that handles login, loading, account-locked, usage-timer expiry, and onboarding states before rendering child content.
frontend/src/components/CameraCaptureSte: Onboarding step that activates the device camera, captures a photo for liveness verification, immediately discards it, and advances the flow.
frontend/src/components/CommunityFeed.ts: Fetches and renders a list of community posts with author, timestamp, and message; shows skeletons while loading and empty/error states as needed.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostFor: Textarea form that lets authenticated users submit a community post, with a 500-character limit and account-locked guard.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCallBut: Pulsing SOS button that shows a confirmation dialog before initiating a tel:911 call via window.location.
frontend/src/components/ExternalSearchBu: Renders Google and DuckDuckGo search buttons for a given query; plays a Robotnik laugh sound and opens the search URL in a new tab on click.
frontend/src/components/KidModeWrapper.t: Utility wrapper that computes a user's age from their profile and conditionally renders kid-specific content or hides content for users aged 12 and under.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component that renders a sticky header with navigation links, a real-time clock, user profile/admin-aware nav items, kid mode support, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/OnboardingFlow.t: Two-step onboarding flow (face/camera check then age verification) that uses sessionStorage to skip the camera step if already completed this session.
frontend/src/components/PINEntryModal.ts: Modal dialog for entering or changing a parental PIN stored in localStorage, with a default PIN of '1234' and inline validation.
Full-screen overlay shown when a user is banned from searching, displaying ban type, reason, an optional appeal button, and a logout option.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Controlled search input form with a clear button and submit handler that calls an onSearch callback with the trimmed query.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Displays a grid of search result cards for Sonic knowledge entries and YouTube channel entries, with loading skeletons and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/components/SearchWarningNot: Dismissible warning banner that shows the user how many search warnings they have received and how many remain before a ban.
frontend/src/components/UsageTimerLockou: Full-screen lockout screen displayed when a child's daily screen-time limit is reached, prompting them to log out.
frontend/src/data/knucklesContent.ts: Defines an array of SonicKnowledgeEntry objects covering Knuckles-related characters, matchups, and lore entries such as his rivalries, clan history, and super form.
frontend/src/data/knucklesVideos.ts: Exports a list of VideoEntry objects representing Knuckles-themed YouTube video metadata, including titles, IDs, and kid-safety flags.
frontend/src/data/sonicAbilities.ts: Exports a single SonicKnowledgeEntry for Amy's Piko Piko Hammer ability, along with an array of alias keywords for matching hammer/strength-related queries.
frontend/src/data/sonicBoomVideos.ts: Exports a large list of VideoEntry objects for Sonic Boom TV episodes across multiple seasons, each with a placeholder YouTube ID and kid-friendly flag.
frontend/src/data/sonicCharacters.ts: Exports an array of SonicKnowledgeEntry objects describing major Sonic franchise characters including Sonic, Shadow, Tails, Amy, Rouge, Sticks, Eggman, Orbot, and Cubot.
frontend/src/data/sonicItems.ts: Exports two SonicKnowledgeEntry items representing the Chaos Emeralds and the Chili Dog, with descriptions and highlights for each.
frontend/src/data/sonicLore.ts: Defines a SonicLoreEntry interface and exports a chronological array of lore entries covering major Sonic game storylines from 1991 through Sonic Adventure, including key characters and notable events.
frontend/src/data/sonicPrimeVideos.ts: Exports a list of VideoEntry objects for all three seasons of the Sonic Prime Netflix series, each with placeholder YouTube IDs and kid-friendly flags.
frontend/src/data/sonicSaysVideos.ts: Defines a VideoEntry interface and exports an array of 15 kid-friendly 'Sonic Says' educational video entries, each with metadata like id, title, YouTube ID, and category.
frontend/src/data/youtubeChannels.ts: Defines a YouTubeChannelEntry interface and exports a single-entry array representing the 'Teardropbfb' YouTube channel with its URL, description, and aliases.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdBlocker.ts: Custom hook that manages an ad-blocker toggle state persisted in localStorage, defaulting to enabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a collection of React Query hooks for interacting with the ICP backend, covering user profiles, community posts, moderation, and other data operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useRobotnikLaugh.ts: Custom hook that synthesizes a Dr. Robotnik-style villain laugh using the Web Audio API with sawtooth oscillators, requiring no external audio assets.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchModerator.ts: Custom hook that enforces search query moderation by tracking warnings and bans (including for porn searches) with state persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useUsageTimer.ts: Custom hook that manages a countdown timer based on a user profile's remaining usage time, updating every second and exposing expiry state and a time formatter.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a Sonic-themed design system with CSS custom properties for light/dark modes plus reusable component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AgeMatcher.tsx: Page that lets users find other Sonic fans born in the same year using age-based matching, restricted to admins and showing a 'coming soon' state for regular users.
frontend/src/pages/AppealPage.tsx: Page allowing banned users to submit a one-time appeal with a text form, enforcing origin validation, character limits, and navigating home on acknowledgment.
frontend/src/pages/BlockBlastGame.tsx: Canvas-based Tetris-style block game with piece movement, rotation, line clearing, scoring, and high score persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Community hub page displaying a post form and feed for users aged 13+, with kid mode gating, warning display, and a link to the age-matched friend finder.
frontend/src/pages/FriendsModePage.tsx: Page allowing users to request access to Friends Mode by submitting their birthdate for admin review, and displays approval/denial status with options to set a display name once approved.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: Displays a grid of available mini-games (Block Blast and Sonic Runner) with thumbnails and play links, plus a button to open an external games site.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatchGame.tsx: A Sonic-themed memory card matching game with a 4x4 grid, move counter, and timer that tracks elapsed time until all pairs are matched.
frontend/src/pages/ModerationDashboard.t: Admin-only dashboard for moderating community posts, issuing warnings to users, reviewing Friends Mode requests, and marking submitted ideas as reviewed.
frontend/src/pages/ParentalDashboard.tsx: PIN-protected parental controls page that allows parents or admins to set usage time limits for specific users or themselves via a slider input.
frontend/src/pages/RingCollectorGame.tsx: A canvas-based mini-game where the player moves left/right to collect falling rings while avoiding obstacles, with score tracking and localStorage high score persistence.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: A search page for a Sonic-themed app that queries local knowledge entries (characters, items, abilities, etc.) and backend data, displaying tabbed results with category browsing, YouTube channel matches, and search moderation features.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: A settings page allowing users to manage their profile, set/change a numeric PIN password, upload videos, submit ideas, and toggle features like ad blocking, with kid-mode awareness.
frontend/src/pages/SonicDodgeGame.tsx: A canvas-based dodge game where the player moves in all directions to avoid obstacles that home in from all sides, with increasing difficulty over time and localStorage high score tracking.
frontend/src/pages/SonicJumpGame.tsx: A side-scrolling platformer mini-game where the player jumps across procedurally generated platforms, with gravity physics, score tracking, and localStorage high score persistence.
frontend/src/pages/SonicRunnerGame.tsx: A canvas-based endless runner game featuring a Sonic-inspired character that jumps over obstacles and collects rings, with score tracking and local high score persistence.
frontend/src/pages/SonicTriviaGame.tsx: A Sonic the Hedgehog trivia quiz game with 22 multiple-choice questions, tracking correct answers and displaying a final score upon completion.
frontend/src/pages/SpinDashChallengeGame: A skill-based mini-game where players hold and release a button to land a charge meter within a randomized target zone across 8 rounds, with high score saved to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/VideosPage.tsx: A video gallery page displaying Sonic and Knuckles YouTube videos with category filtering and kid-mode support, embedding videos inline on click.
frontend/src/pages/WhackAChaoGame.tsx: A 30-second whack-a-mole style game using a 3x3 grid of Chao characters that randomly appear, with score tracking and localStorage high score persistence.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), OKLCH-based design tokens (colors, shadows, border radii), keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Persistent project state document (version 45) describing Scrambly, a Sonic-themed super app for ages 10–18, including its architectural decisions, existing features, and known technical/legal issues.
